flashcards.definition: A ratio P(x)/Q(x) of two polynomials, where Q(x) ≠ 0.
x-values that make the denominator zero; the expression is undefined there.
The smallest expression divisible by every denominator; used when adding or subtracting rational expressions.
A fraction whose numerator or denominator (or both) contain fractions.
Factor numerator and denominator, cancel common factors, and state restrictions.
